creator: me@cschwarz.com
text:
To be more specific, the changes made to ports-mgmt/pkg in revision r402334 should be merged into the quarterly branch.

Why?
The release is contains nothing but bugfixes [1].
And, while not in the official changelog, it apparently resolves issues I had with repositories not updating under certain conditions [2].

[1] http://www.freshports.org/commit.php?category=ports-mgmt&port=pkg&files=yes&message_id=201511232156.tANLuETt033816@repo.freebsd.org

[2] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-pkg/2015-November/001376.html
